summary: TEST__happy-path-in-session: structured logging on ingestion service

local.change_request: Add structured logging to the ingestion service so we can correlate request traces in Grafana.
local.intent_analysis:
Ask: feature — add structured (JSON) logging across the ingestion service entrypoints and worker handlers.
Systems/files (best guess; no ingestion/ in this repo): request/handler layer, logging utility, Grafana datasource config.
Constraints: preserve existing log levels; trace_id must propagate through async boundaries; no PII in structured fields.
Codeowners: no CODEOWNERS file in repo — defaults to repo owner (git user.name).
Acceptance: every ingestion log line emits JSON with trace_id; Grafana can filter by trace_id; existing tests pass.
